reference: I had my wisdom teeth pulled three days ago under anesthesia, and since then my throat has been sore. I just recently looked in the back of my throat, and there are white sores back there. The anesthesia also made my lips crack and peel, so I am wondering if this was a reaction to the medication.
text: I had my wisdom teeth pulled 3 days ago under anesthesia, and since then my lips have been sore. I just recently looked in the back of my throat, and there are white sores back there. The anesthesia also made my lips crack and peel, so I am wondering if this was a reaction to the medication.
